---
title: "The Session Zero Playbook"
aliases: []
family: "Players & Social Dynamics"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

<!-- STUB — Phase 2 outline. Prose gated until Phase 4. Tracked in #47. -->

<!-- BACKLINKS:START (generated by scripts/backlinks.py — do not edit by hand) -->

## Referenced by

- [Campaign Arc Shapes](../structure-pacing/campaign-arc-shapes.qmd)
- [Sandbox, Situation & the Railroad Spectrum](../structure-pacing/sandbox-situation-and-the-railroad-spectrum.qmd)
- [West Marches & the Open-Table Format](../structure-pacing/west-marches-and-the-open-table-format.qmd)

<!-- BACKLINKS:END -->
